===================
=== INFO.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan - 2001-10-09 Medford, OR

Lineage: audio cd-r's > EAC (Secure, Offset Correct)  WAV > TLH-FLAC (8)

CD1
1 Wait For The Light To Shine (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin) (song by Fred Rose) 
2 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
3 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro) 
4 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin)
5 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum 
6 I Threw It All Away (Larry on pedal steel guitar) 
7 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass) 
8 Mississippi (Larry on steel guitar) 
9 Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro) 
10 Girl Of The North Country (acoustic) 
11 Visions Of Johanna (acoustic) (Bob on harp) 
12 Tombstone Blues 

CD2
1 Sugar Baby (Tony on standup bass) 
2 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp) 
3 Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat 
(encore) 
4 Love Sick 
5 Like A Rolling Stone 
6 I Shall Be Released (acoustic) 
7 Honest With Me 
8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
